chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 557 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2502/2021 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.2503/2021 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 21-04-2022 Raja Altaf Hussain Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> 1. Deferred. 2. Granted, subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Through this Petition, the Petitioners have impugned orders dated 24-02-2021 and 02-02-2021 passed respectively by the Appellate Court and the Trial Court in F.C Suit No.06/2020, whereby both the Courts below have appointed and maintained the appointment of Receiver. The Petitioners are aggrieved by such appointment, hence this Petition. We have perused the orders and it appears that the dispute between the parties is to the extent of their legal shares as being legal-heirs of Late Jan Muhammad and it is a case wherein co-sharers are involved. In that case, we do not see any reason to interfere in the appointment of Receiver which appears to be just and fair as to the facts of the case. In view of such position, this Petition is dismissed in limine with pending Application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
